Sending Message with Advance Parameters
You could use the XML API to submit messages with advance parameters such as DCS, UDHI,
Validity Period, Priority etc. Below is a sample of the same.
Sample API Call made by Client’s Application
http:// 172.16.2.99/ConnectOneUrl/SendXml/SendSmsXml?data=
<MESSAGE VER="1.2">
<USER USERNAME="admin" PASSWORD="admin" DLR="0"/>
